div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:

description.value: SMART DAK for Immunizations

valueMarkdown.value: Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on HL7 Terminology
Automatically added as a dependency - all IGs depend on the HL7 Extension Pack

name.value: Assemble all needed materials for immunization session

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >The system to provide a immunization session materials checklist, which is a list of materials I would need for immunization session so that >I can make sure I have the materials I need for immunization session
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to provide a history of previous care (including previous vaccination records) so that >I have access and review client's history
As a Health worker, I want: >To add client's health history (including previous vaccination records) so that >I can appropriately determine which vaccinations are required

name.value: Check stock availability of recommended vaccines

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >The system to display stock availability of recommended vaccines so that >I can check if the vaccines are available

name.value: Check stock availability of recommended vaccines

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >The system to warn if required vaccine is not in stock so that >I can alert the client if the vaccine is not available

name.value: Check stock availability of recommended vaccines

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >The system to display the expiry date of stock to ensure expired vaccines are not administered so that >I give safe and effective doses only
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to enforce a minimal required data set for new registrations so that >Sufficient data is entered to be able to identify the client

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to uniquely identify every client using a system generated unique identifier or an existing identifier (e.g. health care, national ID, health unique ID) so that >The client can be definitively identified using that number
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to generate a unique identifier so that >The client can be uniquely identified for vaccination activities across systems using the same ID
As a Health worker, I want: >Validate a unique identifier when system is offline so that >Entry errors are prevented
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to update vaccination location information so that >We have a complete vaccination location record

As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to configure report parameters when creating new reports (period of time, inactive versus active clients, client's age, vaccine type, vaccine manufacturer, etc.) so that >Appropriate reports can be generated

As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to select report parameters when creating vaccination coverage reports (i.e. by vaccine, by dose, by age, by area, by condition, by vaccine manufacturer, etc) so that >Appropriate vaccination coverage reports can be generated

As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to customize report parameters for error monitoring reports so that >I can generate reports specific to my needs and the nature of potential programmatic errors I want to monitor
As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to select what information a report shows (i.e. display options, summary versus detail report, sort options) so that >The report presentation can be customised
As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to schedule routine reports (specific date/time, daily, weekly, etc.) so that >The reports can be generated automatically and are available at the right time

As a Health worker, I want: >To select reminder parameters. May include but not limited to, age range, vaccine type(s), vaccine schedules, geographic area, number of days overdue, number of reminders, etc. so that >Reminders can be optimized
As a Health worker, I want: >To associate a client with a vaccination location to generate a provider-based reminder/recall so that >Vaccination location specific lists of clients can be generated

As a Health worker, I want: >To validate data against the vaccine schedule (Note: Can use the vaccine schedule to best schedule reminders/recall for series vaccinations) so that >The generated list adheres to guidelines

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to flag a client as a defaulter after a configured number of reminders are sent so that >We can identify those who have not come and are overdue, requiring additional intervention

As a Health worker, I want: >To specify thresholds for a client to qualify as requiring follow-up, based on the national immunization guidelines so that >Follow up is only done at the appropriate time
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to display vaccines due according to predefined vaccine protocol so that >I can assess which vaccines need to be administered

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to determine vaccines due for a given client by considering relevant information, such as the age of the client, vaccine products, vaccines already given and predefined vaccine protocol so that >it helps me with selecting the appropriate vaccines for the client
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to ensure I have the most up-to-date vaccine protocols so that >It will recommend the correct schedule

name.value: Determine time for next visit (as needed)

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >The system to display due date of the next vaccine so that >I can inform the client when to return for their next vaccination

name.value: Determine vaccine(s) to be administered based on contraindications

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To be alerted of any relevant potential contraindications for the vaccine (e.g. based on age, previous allergic reactions, etc.) so that >I can withhold the vaccine, if contraindicated

name.value: Determine vaccine(s) to be administered based on contraindications

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to quickly access information regarding any contraindications by antigen so that >I can access all information on contraindications in one place
As a Health worker, I want: >To update stock record so that >I know which stock adjustments have not been done automatically (such as in instances if something is wasted)

name.value: Does client require a verifiable digital certificate?

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To be prompted to ask client if they want a digital vaccination certificate where appropriate so that >The digital vaccination certificate can be generated
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to manually initiate duplicates identification process so that >It can be done when the user is available to review
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to manually flag duplicate vaccination events so that >I can report duplicates that the system was not able to identify

As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >The system to display a specific set of data related to the possible duplicated events (such as vaccine type, manufacturer, administration date, etc.) for manual review so that >I am able to perform the review
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to view simultaneously potential duplicate records so that >I can easily compare the records and to determine if they are duplicates
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to access the vaccination events while reviewing the duplicates so that >I can review other fields to aid in my decision-making
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to support a rules-based algorithm to evaluate duplicate records so that >Duplicates can be found by the system using pre-defined rules
As a EIR staff, I want: >To be able to modify the business rules used for identifying duplicate client records so that >The de-duplication process is optimized

As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to automatically flag client records as possible duplicates by marking them as pending for review so that >The health worker or EIR staff is informed and aware of pending review

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to track the number of reminders attempts (i.e. per client and total) so that >I can know if additional action may be required, or when to stop sending reminders

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to prevent all records given an inactive or deceased status from being included in the list of clients for reminder/recall so that >Notifications will not be inappropriately sent to clients
As a Health worker, I want: >to be able to generate a list of clients according to defined parameters so that >I have a list according to my needs
As a Health worker, I want: >To print the list of clients generated according to defined parameters so that >I can use it when I am offline
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to log each time a user prints a list of clients so that >Printing needs can be monitored
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to display the date the reminder/recall notice was sent to a client so that >I will know when it was sent and can follow-up accordingly

name.value: Generate list of clients who are due or overdue for vaccination

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To produce a list of clients who missed their vaccine for each antigen, along with their location and personal information so that >I can plan follow up activities and contact the clients

name.value: Generate list of clients who are due or overdue for vaccination

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To print a list of clients requiring follow-up so that >I will have an offline version

name.value: Generate list of clients who are due or overdue for vaccination

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To export a list of clients for follow-up so that >Information can be sent to another health worker or system as appropriate
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to produce and export reports in multiple formats (i.e. CSV, PDF) on demand so that >I can select the most appropriate format for my needs
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to print reports on demand so that >I can have a paper version of the report
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to show me a preview of the report before printing so that >I can review before printing
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to log the actions performed on the reports so that >An audit can be performed when needed
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to offer the posibility of sending the generated report by email so that >I do not have to manually do that

name.value: Generate report of duplicate vaccine events

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to generate a report of duplicate vaccine events including the resolutions so that >I can have a summary of the changes made

As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to generate a unique EIR identifier which may be linked to national ID or health ID so that >The vaccination location will have an unique identifier in the EIR system
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to apply an authorised digital signature when necessary and appropriate so that >The identity of the issuing authority can be validated
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to allow me to print the stock order(s) to be fulfilled so that >I can use this as my pick up list, even when I am offline

name.value: Identify groups of vaccination events for evaluation

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to support a rules-based algorithm to evaluate duplicate events so that >Duplicates can be found by the system using pre-defined rules

name.value: Identify groups of vaccination events for evaluation

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to automatically flag event records as possible duplicates by marking them as pending for review so that >The health worker or EIR staff is informed and aware of pending review

name.value: Identify groups of vaccination events for evaluation

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >to be able to modify the business rules used for identifying vaccination events duplicates so that >The de-duplication process can be optimized

name.value: Identify groups of vaccination events for evaluation

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to prompt the user that a new vaccination event might already exist so that >The user can decide if it is a duplicate and if so not save it

name.value: Identify groups of vaccination events for evaluation

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to generate automatically a list of possible duplicated vaccination events so that >The review process is optimized
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to flag records as \"not a duplicate\" so that >It is not presented as a possible duplicates by the system

As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to enter comments for records marked as \"not a duplicate\" so that >I can add any additional information to let other users see why it was determined to not be a duplicate
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to merge records confirmed to be duplicates so that >Duplicate records can be merged
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to support an audit trail when records are merged so that >Accountability can be maintained
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to provide history of merged record for a given client so that >I can double check if the merge was done appropriately
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to undo a merge so that >I can restore records merged incorrectly

name.value: Monitor the client for any adverse reactions

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To record any significant observations (such as reaction) that may be specific to that client so that >I can treat as appropriate

As a Electronic immunization registry (EIR) staff, I want: >The EIR system to be able to communicate with other systems (such as a national health management information system [HMIS] and Expanded Programme on Immunization [EPI]) to obtain vaccination locations information and other necessary information so that >I will know about new vaccination locations and be informed about any updated information
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to manually flag duplicate records so that >I can identify potential duplicates myself for resolution
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to view simultaneously potential duplicate records so that >I can easily compare the records and determine if they are duplicates

As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to access the client records while reviewing the duplicates so that >I can review other fields, such as immunization history, to aid in my decision-making
As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to decide what information to keep from the duplicates so that >I make sure the most appropriate information is kept in the consolidated record

name.value: Plan for follow-up directly or during outreach

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To display a list of clients due for specific planned outreach and immunization sessions, based on area so that >The immunization session or outreach will have a targeted list of clients, allowing for prioritization of tasks and workload

name.value: Produce list of potential duplicate records

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to schedule batching of duplicate record process so that >They may be processed and assessed together when user is ready
As a Community health worker, I want: >To record in the system the results of the follow-up so that >The information is available in the system and is available for review
As a Health worker, I want: >To be prompted for any data required to produce a digital vaccine certificate so that >The record will have all relevant data to produce a certificate
As a Health worker, I want: >To search for a client using at least two identifying information so that >I improve my chances of finding a match and distinguishing between similar records
As a Health worker, I want: >To search for the client record given some demographic information so that >I can find the client record if I do not have the unique ID
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to return all potential matches based upon search criteria so that >I can find the best match
As a Health worker, I want: >The search to match on partial information (such as partial birthdates) so that >I have a better chance of finding a match

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to allow search parameters configuration: mandatory fields, when partial information is acceptable, etc. so that >A search can be optimized without compromising confidentiality
As a Health worker, I want: >To search with wild cards (using a symbol to replace one or more characters) so that >I can find something without knowing the exact spelling
As a Health worker, I want: >To find client records using barcodes that contain the client ID so that >I can quickly pull up the correct record
As a Health worker, I want: >The ability for searches to include results that look or sound similar to the search term (phonetic search) so that >I can find something that may be spelt incorrectly
As a Health worker, I want: >the system to identify any records that may have been imported from another system so that >I can verify the quality of imported data
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to prompt a search for the client (check if it is already in the system) prior to starting a new record so that >Duplicates are prevented
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to retrieve and display, as a search result, a specific set of data (demographic information/photo/unique ID, etc. ) so that >I can select the correct record
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to display the most probable matches at the top of the list so that >I can review them first
As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to extend the search to external systems (such as a birth registry or a scheduling system) so that >Duplicates of client record are prevented
As a Health worker, I want: >To enter additional search criteria if there are multiple possible matches so that >My list of matches is shorter and easier to review

As a Health worker, I want: >To print the list of necessary antigens and accessories (e.g. syringes, wipes) based on projected need so that >I can make sure I have an offline list of all the things I need for my immunization session

As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to check in the system the available stock at my vaccination location or at the local storage area/warehouse so that >I can determine the stock available for use
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to compare the list of needed antigens to the stock on hand and indicate if there is sufficient stock so that >I do not have to make these calculations myself
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to allow barcode reading of stock taken so that >the system can be automatically and accurately updated

As a Health worker, I want: >To record stock removed from cold storage and taken to immunization session so that >The count for the cold storage will be accurate, and the immunization session stock will be accounted for

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to maintain a tally of stock available at each location (e.g. stock available in the cold fridge at vaccination location, stock that is out for immunization session) so that >I can see where all stock is physically located in real time

name.value: Record the necessary information to follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To assign a community health worker to a client so that >I can send client information to the correct community health worker

name.value: Record the necessary information to follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >The system to group the defaulters by location and community health worker so that >I can send to the community health workers the appropriate list
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to notify me of incomplete mandatory fields so that >I can ensure all necessary data is entered
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to support the process of sending a request for information so that >I will not have to transcribe the request and send it manually

name.value: Review past vaccination records to estimate vaccines needed

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To identify, by checking the information in the system, all clients that are due (or overdue) for vaccination by the next immunization session date so that >I can plan my immunization session

name.value: Review past vaccination records to estimate vaccines needed

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To sort the list of needed vaccines by antigen so that >I know how much of each vaccine is needed

name.value: Review past vaccination records to estimate vaccines needed

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >The system to provide range estimates for needed vaccines based on historical data (high and low ranges) so that >I can know how much vaccine has typically been used and adjust my specific list accordingly

As a Health worker, I want: >To select one or more notification methods (e.g. automated telephone calls [i.e. robocall], text message, letter, email, community health worker notification, home visits) so that >The most appropriate notification method will be used
As a Health worker, I want: >To set client's preferred contact method so that >Any notification will go through the client’s preferred method

name.value: Select the most accurate/suitable event record

description.value: As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >The system to automatically select the most accurate/suitable vaccination event to be used as the (primary or master) record so that >the manual review process is optimized

name.value: Select the most accurate/suitable event record

description.value: As a EIR staff OR health worker, I want: >To be able to merge manually duplicate records and decide what information to keep from the duplicates into a consolidated event record so that >I make sure the most accurate consolidated record is kept

name.value: Send client information to community health worker

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To send list of clients who missed immunization sessions by email or SMS to the community health worker so that >The community health worker will have a digital version

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to automatically send reminder notification to client or designated health worker (i.e. community health worker) based on the configured reminder parameters so that >they will be alerted of an upcoming or overdue appointment

As a Health worker, I want: >The notification to include specific details about upcoming immunization session dates and times or outreach dates and times as appropriate so that >The client will know specifically when and where to go to receive a vaccination
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to send EIR registration notification with EIR identifer to other systems so that >Other systems will be informed of the new vaccination location
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to include instructions on how to use EIR identifier so that >Other systems will know how to interact with the EIR
As a Health worker, I want: >To document why a vaccine was not given so that >The client has a complete record

As a Health worker, I want: >To update clients’ vaccination record with all relevant information (i.e. date, dose, batch number, lot number, vaccine type, vaccine vial monitor status) so that >The client has a complete record, and doses can be traced

As a Health worker, I want: >The system to associate the context data for each entry (e.g. the vaccination location where the dose was given, the health worker administering it) so that >The client has a complete record and I can investigate if any issues arise
As a Health worker, I want: >To record additional vaccinations, even those that are not included in the national vaccination schedule so that >The client has a complete record
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to log updates of client information so that >Users are accountable for the data they modify
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to request confirmation if data is modified so that >Accidental or erroneous changes will not be saved

name.value: Update record to document reason/lost follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To record reason vaccine was missed so that >This information can be used for planning and reporting purposes

name.value: Update record to document reason/lost follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To update client information such as including change of address (moved permanently or temporarily) so that >To facilitate the client being contacted or being removed from a immunization session’s list

name.value: Update record to document reason/lost follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To flag when there is a change of address and a new client has been added to another catchment area so that >The client will appear on the correct list for follow up

name.value: Update record to document reason/lost follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to indicate if a client is inactive, identified as either permanently or temporarily, with a reason (e.g. death, moved, refuses vaccine) so that >No further follow up will be done, and they will not appear as defaulters

name.value: Update record to document reason/lost follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to set a specific inactivity time frame for temporarily inactive clients (e.g. temporarily lost residence, crop harvest season) so that >I can distinguish between those who may require follow up at a specific time in future versus those which are inactive for a indeterminate period of time

name.value: Update record to document reason/lost follow-up

description.value: As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to generate a report of clients who are inactive and disaggregate by the reason they are inactive so that >It can be used for reporting and planning
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to support an audit trail when event records are merged so that >Accountability can be maintained
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to provide history of merged event records so that >I can double check if the merge was done appropriately

As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to allow manual insertion of a new vaccination location not present in the NMFL in the EIR master list so that >I can add and use vaccination locations that are not yet in NMFL or other interconnected systems
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to send a notification to the NMFL about a new vaccination location added to EIR so that >The NMFL can be aware of any potentially new vaccination locations

As a EIR staff, I want: >To be able to include vaccination locations that may not be physical permanent facilities (such as temporary or pop-up clinics) so that >We will have the flexibility to accommodate temporary vaccination locations
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to allow conversion of a temporary vaccination location to a permanent vaccination location so that >The data from the temporary vaccination location is not lost

name.value: Validate against national master facility list

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to interface with National Master Facility List (NMFL) database to validate the EIR master list of vaccination locations so that >I can ensure the lists are synchronized

name.value: Validate against national master facility list

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to flag any vaccination location registered in the EIR that is not on the NMFL so that >I can identify vaccination locations that need further investigation

name.value: Validate against national master facility list

description.value: As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to be able to link a vaccination location’s NMFL identification (ID) with the corresponding EIR identifier so that >There will be a common understanding of what vaccination location is being referenced
As a Health worker, I want: >To select the place of birth from a standardized list of locations so that >Entry errors are prevented
As a Health worker, I want: >To select the vaccination location of the client from a list of locations so that >Entry errors are prevented
As a Health worker, I want: >The ability to generate a barcode label to affix to the paper record so that >The record can easily be uniquely identified by scanning the ID

As a Health worker, I want: >The ability to associate a unique ID generated by another authority (local or global) to the record so that >The record can be more easily shared or identified with other appropriate systems
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to display the information of the selected record so that >I can validate and update (if needed) client information
As a Health worker, I want: >To be able to modify appropriate client data as needed so that >the record contains up to date information
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to track that I have changed an existing record so that >accountability for data modification is ensured
As a Health worker, I want: >The system to identify changes made to the record for my confirmation before saving so that >I can have the opportunity to double check the data to prevent entry errors

As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to automatically identify changes in vaccination locations information, retrieved from other interconnected systems, and prompt for validation so that >I will know what changes are being made and can validate them
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to verify all required vaccination location information is complete so that >Any missed fields can be identified
As a EIR staff, I want: >The system to generate report of missing information so that >Missing information can be obtained
